SessionStart.command: rt event create --run-id "$RUNTRAIL_RUN_ID" --type started --message "Claude Code session started" --importance 4

Notification.command: rt event create --run-id "$RUNTRAIL_RUN_ID" --type decision_required --message "Claude Code needs input" --importance 8

PostToolUse.command: rt event create --run-id "$RUNTRAIL_RUN_ID" --type files_changed --message "Claude Code changed files" --importance 5

Stop.command: rt event create --run-id "$RUNTRAIL_RUN_ID" --type completed --message "Claude Code completed" --importance 6

SubagentStop.command: rt event create --run-id "$RUNTRAIL_RUN_ID" --type completed --message "Claude Code subagent completed" --importance 5
